title: Device(headset) inventory details
scenario: Headset device details (model, serial number, last detected, software version) display correctly in Poly Lens app under Menu > General > Account > Inventory after login
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens app on the mobile device.
2. Log in to the Poly Lens account if not already logged in.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) in the top-left or top-right corner.
5. Tap on 'Inventory' within the Account section.
6. Locate the connected headset entry in the inventory list.
7. Verify the displayed device details: Model, Serial Number, Last Detected date/time, and Software Version.
expected: The connected headset's device details (Model, Serial Number, Last Detected, Software Version) are displayed correctly and match the actual headset information.
